projectDescription: Open-source bipedal robotic legs for humanoid robots built with off-the-shelf components.
keyFeatures: RSU ankle mechanism with pitch/roll coupling
publicApiSurface: Left leg joints: L_Hip_Pitch, L_Hip_Roll, L_Hip_Yaw, L_Knee_Pitch, L_Ankle_A, L_Ankle_B
Right leg joints: R_Hip_Pitch, R_Hip_Roll, R_Hip_Yaw, R_Knee_Pitch, R_Ankle_A, R_Ankle_B
Motors: EC-A6416-P2-25 (Hip Pitch), EC-A5013-H17-100 (Hip Roll), EC-A3814-H14-107 (Hip Yaw), EC-A4315-P2-36 (Knee), EC-A4310-P2-36 (Ankle)
